name: Dead Again
author: Poki
description: Death was not enough to keep these evil spirits down. Defend yourself against the onslaught of zombies, vampires, ghosts ... and more. The longer you play, the stronger they get. Survive for as long as you can, but it is only a matter of time before you are ... DEAD AGAIN How to play Dead Again? Move: WASD or arrow keys Shoot: Left mouse button Aim: Mouse Mobile Controls: Move: Left stick Aim: Right stick Shoot: Auto shoot when you aim at an enemy Who created Dead Again? Dead Again is created by Lax Viking Games. This is their first game on Poki and they were one of the winners of the JS13K competition! How can I play Dead Again for free? You can play Dead Again for free on Poki. Can I play Dead Again on mobile devices and desktop? Dead Again can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
